summary: Comprehensive testing of Orcabet fantasy sports betting app with Firebase Auth migration completed. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working across all pages with correct navigation, design theme, and Firebase authentication.
passed_tests: Firebase Auth - Admin login (admin@orcabet.com/admin123) works correctly
Firebase Auth - Login redirects to dashboard
Firebase Auth - Registration form shows 100 coins welcome message
Firebase Auth - Logout redirects to auth page
Dashboard - User greeting, balance display, quick action buttons working
Sidebar navigation - All 8 links present (Inicio, Apuestas, Tienda, Mercado, Coleccion, Ruleta, Show, Admin)
Sidebar navigation - 'Mi Equipo' link correctly REMOVED
Betting page - Events display with 'No hay eventos disponibles' empty state
Shop page - All 4 pack types displayed (Gratis, Basico 100, Oro 250, Premium 500)
Roulette page - Full casino wheel (0-36 numbers), outside bets, 3 daily spins
Market page - Listings view with 'Vender Carta' button
Collection page - Card collection with progress bar and filters
Show page - Leaderboard with user ranking and search
Admin page - Stats, Eventos/Atletas/Usuarios tabs, Crear Evento button
Font - Montserrat used everywhere (verified via CSS and browser)
Colors - Orange #ff5e00 accent on black background theme
Backend API - GET /api/events public endpoint
Backend API - GET /api/athletes (26 athletes seeded)
Backend API - GET /api/packs/config (correct pricing)
Backend API - GET /api/market listings
Backend API - GET /api/users/leaderboard (excludes admins)
Backend API - POST /api/auth/login with Firebase token
Backend API - GET /api/user/profile
Backend API - GET /api/user/balance
Backend API - GET /api/bets/mine
Backend API - POST /api/events (admin create event)
Backend API - GET /api/events/all (admin)
Backend API - GET /api/collection
Backend API - GET /api/roulette/status
Backend API - GET /api/packs/free-available
Backend API - GET /api/admin/stats
Backend API - GET /api/admin/users
Backend API - Event lifecycle (create -> close -> resolve -> delete)
Backend API - Athlete CRUD (create -> update -> delete)
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured with proper Firebase Auth integration
Backend properly verifies Firebase ID tokens and manages user sessions
Frontend uses axios interceptor for automatic token attachment
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Proper error handling for auth flows
seed_data_creation: 26 athletes seeded, admin user created in Firebase Auth and MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Firebase Auth flows verified working. Backend APIs fully tested with pytest. Frontend navigation and core features tested. No 'Mi Equipo' link present. Montserrat font and orange/black theme verified. Admin page has Events/Athletes/Users tabs with CRUD functionality.

design_verification.font: Montserrat (verified in CSS and browser computed styles)
